sizing_rule.note: Position sizing must derive optimal f from the sequence of individual trade outcomes, NOT from averaged win/loss statistics applied to Kelly formula. Calculate f by finding the highest TWR across the specific trade sequence. Averaging wins and losses destroys the true optimal f value.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must be derived from optimal f specific to individual bets, not from averaged wins and losses applied to the Kelly formula, as averaging fails to yield true optimal f.
